errors.403switch: Sign in to a different account

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.heroSub: ความรู้สึกของคุณเป็นของคุณ
privacy.sum1body: Your entries are kept in encrypted cloud storage. Photos use private signed links that expire every hour.
privacy.sum2body: Ever. No ads, no data brokers, no third-party analytics.
privacy.sum3body: Smart Log uses Google Gemini. You choose when to analyze. Your notes aren't kept on AI servers.
privacy.sum4body: One tap exports your data. One tap deletes your account — everything goes with it.
privacy.s1body: Mood entries, notes, photos and tags you create. Your email + display name. Accent color and language preference. That's the whole list.
privacy.s2body: When you tap **Analyze with AI**, your note is sent to Google Gemini over TLS, analyzed for mood + tags, and the response comes back. We don't store your note on the AI server. You can disable this in Settings → Privacy & data.
privacy.s3body: Photos you attach are stored in Cloudflare R2. They're accessed via signed URLs that expire after 1 hour — no one can hotlink your images.
privacy.s4body: **Cloudflare** — hosting & storage. **Google Gemini** — AI analysis. **Resend** — transactional email. **Stripe** — payment processing. **Google** — OAuth login. Each processes only the minimum data needed.
privacy.s5body: We keep your data as long as you have an account. Delete your account and everything is permanently removed — entries, images, AI cache, achievements, all of it.
privacy.s6body: You can export all your data (Settings → Data). You can delete your account at any time (Profile → Edit). You can turn off AI features and use the app as a simple journal.
privacy.s7body: Questions about your data? Reach us at hello@dailymood.me

terms.title: Terms
terms.heroSub: ข้อตกลงการใช้งานแบบเข้าใจง่าย
terms.sum1body: You must be at least 13. Under 18? Get a guardian to OK it.
terms.sum2body: Use the app for yourself. No scraping, abuse, or reverse-engineering.
terms.sum3body: Cancel any time in your subscription settings. Refunds per Stripe policy.
terms.sum4body: DailyMood helps you reflect. It is not therapy or medical advice.
terms.s1body: You're responsible for keeping your password safe. Use a real email so we can help you recover your account.
terms.s2body: Don't break the app, don't try to access other users' data, don't reverse-engineer the AI. Use the app for personal mood tracking — not commercial reselling.
terms.s3body: DailyMood Pro is billed monthly or yearly via Stripe. You can cancel anytime from your subscription settings. Access continues until the end of your billing period.
terms.s4body: Your mood entries, notes and photos belong to you. We don't claim ownership. We only access your content to provide the service (e.g. AI analysis when you request it).
terms.s5body: DailyMood is provided as-is. We do our best but can't guarantee 100% uptime or that the AI will always be accurate. We're not liable for decisions you make based on AI insights.
terms.s6body: We may update these terms. When we do, we'll notify you via email or in-app notice. Continued use means you accept the new terms.
